mnemonics: NEAT Agents: Neural networks, Expert systems, Automated planning, Turing tests
keyPoints: Understand the difference between strong AI and weak AI
Know the key components of an intelligent agent (percepts, actions, goals, environment)
Be able to explain fundamental algorithms like search strategies (BFS, DFS, A*) and machine learning basics
commonMistakes: Failing to distinguish between different types of learning (supervised vs. unsupervised vs. reinforcement)
Overlooking the importance of defining the environment and percepts for an agent
